    91|        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess setup k ω))
    92|        setup.m ω := rfl
    93|
    94|-- ============================================================================
    95|-- Section 2: Measurability and Independence Infrastructure
    96|-- ============================================================================
    97|
    98|/-- Measurability of epoch iterates.
    99|
   100|Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, Step 4 — measurability bridge) -/
   101|theorem outerProcess_measurable
   102|    (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω)
   103|    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
   104|    (hgF : Measurable setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF) (k : ℕ) :
   105|    Measurable (outerProcess setup k) := by
   106|  induction k with
   107|  | zero => exact measurable_const
   108|  | succ k ih =>
   109|      have h_wk_meas : Measurable (outerProcess setup k) := ih
   110|      have h_gradF_wk_meas : Measurable (fun ω => setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess setup k ω)) :=
   111|        hgF.comp h_wk_meas

   113|      sorry
   114|
   115|/-- Independence of epoch k iterate from epoch k samples.
   116|
   117|Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, Step 4 — independence bridge) -/
   118|theorem outerProcess_indepFun_epoch
   119|    (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω)
   120|    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
   121|    (hgF : Measurable setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF) (k : ℕ) :
   122|    ∀ j, IndepFun (outerProcess setup k) (setup.epochStream k j) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := by
   123|  intro j
   124|  sorry
   125|
   126|-- ============================================================================
   127|-- Section 3: Epoch Contraction Factor
   128|-- ============================================================================
   129|
   130|/-- Epoch contraction factor: ρ = (1-ημ)^m + η·(variance terms)/μ.
   131|
   132|Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, contraction factor definition) -/
   133|noncomputable def epochContractionFactor (η μ : ℝ) (L : NNReal) (m : ℕ) : ℝ :=
   134|  (1 - η * μ) ^ m + η * (4 * (L : ℝ) ^ 2 / μ + 2 * (L : ℝ) ^ 2) / μ
   135|
   136|-- ============================================================================
   137|-- Section 4: Main Outer-Loop Convergence Theorem
   138|-- ============================================================================
   139|
   140|/-- SVRG outer-loop convergence: epoch-to-epoch contraction telescoped over K epochs.
   141|
   142|Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, Step 6 — main convergence theorem) -/
   143|theorem svrg_outer_convergence
   144|    (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω) (f : E → ℝ) {L : NNReal} {μ σ η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
   145|    (hgrad : IsGradientOf f setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
   146|    (hsmooth : IsLSmooth setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF L)
   147|    (hsc : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ f)
   148|    (hvar : HasBoundedVariance setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist σ)
   149|    (hunb : IsUnbiased setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist)
   150|    (hmin : IsMinimizer f wStar)
   151|    (h_sample_prob : IsProbabilityMeasure setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist)
   152|    (hμ_pos : 0 < μ) (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hη_L : η ≤ 1 / (2 * (L : ℝ)))
   153|    (hημ : η * μ < 1)
   154|    (K : ℕ) (hK_pos : 0 < K)
   155|    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
   156|    (hgF : Measurable setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
   157|    (h_intL : ∀ w, Integrable (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL w) setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist)
   158|    (h_int_epoch_end : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω => ‖outerProcess setup k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2)
   159|      setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
   160|    (h_int_snapshot : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω =>
   161|      ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess setup k ω)
   162|        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess setup k ω))
   163|        setup.m ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P) :
   164|    ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess setup K ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
   165|      (epochContractionFactor η μ L setup.m) ^ K * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 := by
   166|  haveI := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.hP
   167|  set ρ := epochContractionFactor η μ L setup.m with hρ_def
   168|  
   169|  have h_epoch_contract : ∀ k < K,
   170|      ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess setup (k + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
   171|        ρ * ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess setup k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := by
   172|    intro k hk
   173|    sorry
   174|  
   175|  have h_telescope :
   176|      ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess setup K ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
   177|        ρ ^ K * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 := by
   178|    induction K with
   179|    | zero =>
   180|      simp only [outerProcess_zero setup, pow_zero, one_mul]
   181|      rw [integral_const, smul_eq_mul, probReal_univ, one_mul]
   182|    | succ K ih =>
   183|        have h_contract := h_epoch_contract K (Nat.lt_succ_self K)
   184|        calc ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess setup (K + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P
   185|            ≤ ρ * ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess setup K ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := h_contract
   186|          _ ≤ ρ * (ρ ^ K * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2) := by
   187|              gcongr
   188|          _ = ρ ^ (K + 1) * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 := by
   189|              ring
   190|  
   191|  exact h_telescope
   192|
   193|end SVRGOuterSetup

/-- Measurability of svrgProcess with random snapshot parameters.

When the snapshot wTilde and gradient gradLTilde are random variables (measurable functions Ω → E),
the resulting process remains measurable. This bridges the gap between the fixed-parameter

import Algorithms.SVRG
import Lib.Glue.Probability

open MeasureTheory ProbabilityTheory
open scoped InnerProductSpace

variable {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
  [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E] [SecondCountableTopology E]
variable {S : Type*} [MeasurableSpace S]
variable {Ω : Type*} [MeasurableSpace Ω]

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 1: SVRG Outer Loop Setup
-- ============================================================================

/-- SVRG outer-loop setup: extends SGDSetup with inner epoch length m.

Snapshot parameters (wTilde, gradLTilde) are per-epoch, NOT structure fields,
because they are refreshed every epoch.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop convergence` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, main theorem) -/
structure SVRGOuterLoopSetup
    (E : Type*) [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
      [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E]
    (S : Type*) [MeasurableSpace S]
    (Ω : Type*) [MeasurableSpace Ω] where
  toSGDSetup : SGDSetup E S Ω
  m : ℕ
  hm_pos : 0 < m

namespace SVRGOuterLoopSetup

variable (setup : SVRGOuterLoopSetup E S Ω)

/-- Sample distribution inherited from base setup. -/
noncomputable def sampleDist : Measure S :=
  setup.toSGDSetup.sampleDist

/-- Two-index outer process: outerProcess k t = result after t inner steps of epoch k.

Within epoch k, the snapshot is fixed at wTilde_k = outerProcess k 0.
The update uses the SVRG control-variate oracle:
  w_{k,t+1} = w_{k,t} - η • (gradL(w_{k,t}, ξ) - gradL(wTilde_k, ξ) + gradF(wTilde_k))

At epoch boundary: outerProcess (k+1) 0 = outerProcess k m (snapshot refresh).

Convention 6 (dot notation) MUST be used: setup.outerProcess k t ω

Used in: `SVRG outer loop convergence` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, main theorem) -/
noncomputable def outerProcess : ℕ → ℕ → Ω → E
  | 0, 0 => fun _ => setup.toSGDSetup.w₀
  | 0, t + 1 => fun ω =>
      let w_t := setup.outerProcess 0 t ω
      w_t - setup.toSGDSetup.η t •
        (setup.toSGDSetup.gradL w_t (setup.toSGDSetup.ξ t ω) -
          setup.toSGDSetup.gradL setup.toSGDSetup.w₀ (setup.toSGDSetup.ξ t ω) +
          setup.toSGDSetup.gradF setup.toSGDSetup.w₀)
  | k + 1, 0 => setup.outerProcess k setup.m
  | k + 1, t + 1 => fun ω =>
      let w_t := setup.outerProcess (k + 1) t ω
      let wTilde := setup.outerProcess (k + 1) 0 ω
      w_t - setup.toSGDSetup.η ((k + 1) * setup.m + t) •
        (setup.toSGDSetup.gradL w_t (setup.toSGDSetup.ξ ((k + 1) * setup.m + t) ω) -
          setup.toSGDSetup.gradL wTilde (setup.toSGDSetup.ξ ((k + 1) * setup.m + t) ω) +
          setup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde)

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 2: Process Infrastructure Lemmas
-- ============================================================================

/-- Measurability of outerProcess.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop convergence` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, bridge construction) -/
theorem outerProcess_measurable (k t : ℕ)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSGDSetup.gradL)) :
    Measurable (setup.outerProcess k t) := by
  induction k generalizing t with
  | zero =>
      induction t with
      | zero => exact measurable_const
      | succ t ih =>
          simp only [SVRGOuterLoopSetup.outerProcess]
          have h_wTilde : Measurable (setup.outerProcess 0 0) := measurable_const
          exact ih.sub (((hgL.comp (ih.prodMk (setup.toSGDSetup.hξ_meas t))).sub
            (hgL.comp (h_wTilde.prodMk (setup.toSGDSetup.hξ_meas t)))).add
            (measurable_const.comp h_wTilde)).const_smul _
  | succ k ih =>
      induction t with
      | zero =>
          simp only [SVRGOuterLoopSetup.outerProcess]
          exact ih setup.m
      | succ t ih' =>
          simp only [SVRGOuterLoopSetup.outerProcess]
          have h_wTilde : Measurable (setup.outerProcess (k + 1) 0) := ih setup.m
          exact ih'.sub (((hgL.comp (ih'.prodMk (setup.toSGDSetup.hξ_meas _))).sub
            (hgL.comp (h_wTilde.prodMk (setup.toSGDSetup.hξ_meas _)))).add
            (measurable_const.comp h_wTilde)).const_smul _

/-- Independence of outerProcess k t from fresh sample ξ_{k*m+t}.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop convergence` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, bridge construction) -/
lemma outerProcess_indepFun_xi (k t : ℕ)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSGDSetup.gradL)) :
    IndepFun (setup.outerProcess k t) (setup.toSGDSetup.ξ (k * setup.m + t))
      setup.toSGDSetup.P := by
  -- outerProcess k t depends only on ξ 0, …, ξ (k*m+t-1)
  -- By iIndepFun, this sigma-algebra is independent of σ(ξ_{k*m+t})
  -- Reuse sgdProcess_indepFun_xi pattern
  have h : setup.outerProcess k t = sgdProcess setup.toSGDSetup.w₀ setup.toSGDSetup.η
      (fun w s => setup.toSGDSetup.gradL w s) setup.toSGDSetup.ξ (k * setup.m + t) := by

    -- For now, we prove independence directly via filtration argument

  -- Simplified: use the fact that outerProcess k t is measurable w.r.t. F_{k*m+t}
  -- and ξ_{k*m+t} is independent of F_{k*m+t}
  sorry

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 3: Epoch Contraction (simplified for deterministic snapshot)
-- ============================================================================

/-- Epoch contraction for epoch 0 (deterministic snapshot w₀).

This is a simplified version where the snapshot is the deterministic initial point.
The general case (random snapshot) requires conditional expectation handling.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop convergence` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, base case) -/
theorem svrg_epoch_contraction_epoch0
    (setup : SVRGOuterLoopSetup E S Ω) (f : E → ℝ) {L : NNReal} {μ σeff η : ℝ}
    (wStar : E)
    (hgrad : IsGradientOf f setup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
    (hsmooth : IsLSmooth setup.toSGDSetup.gradF L)
    (hsc : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ f)
    (hunb : IsUnbiased setup.toSGDSetup.gradL setup.toSGDSetup.gradF setup.sampleDist)
    (hmin : IsMinimizer f wStar)
    (h_sample_prob : IsProbabilityMeasure setup.sampleDist)
    (hμ_pos : 0 < μ) (hη_pos : 0 < η) (_hη_L : η ≤ 1 / (L : ℝ))
    (hημ : η * μ < 1) (hη : ∀ t, setup.toSGDSetup.η t = η)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (h_intL : ∀ w, Integrable (setup.toSGDSetup.gradL w) setup.sampleDist)
    (h_int_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.toSGDSetup.gradL (setup.outerProcess 0 t ω) (setup.toSGDSetup.ξ t ω) -
          setup.toSGDSetup.gradL setup.toSGDSetup.w₀ (setup.toSGDSetup.ξ t ω) +
          setup.toSGDSetup.gradF setup.toSGDSetup.w₀‖ ^ 2) setup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.outerProcess 0 t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_inner : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ⟪setup.outerProcess 0 t ω - wStar,
          setup.toSGDSetup.gradL (setup.outerProcess 0 t ω) (setup.toSGDSetup.ξ t ω) -
          setup.toSGDSetup.gradL setup.toSGDSetup.w₀ (setup.toSGDSetup.ξ t ω) +
          setup.toSGDSetup.gradF setup.toSGDSetup.w₀⟫_ℝ) setup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_gF_inner : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ⟪setup.outerProcess 0 t ω - wStar,
          setup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.outerProcess 0 t ω)⟫_ℝ) setup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (hvar_eff : HasBoundedVariance
        (fun w s => setup.toSGDSetup.gradL w s - setup.toSGDSetup.gradL setup.toSGDSetup.w₀ s +
          setup.toSGDSetup.gradF setup.toSGDSetup.w₀)
        setup.sampleDist σeff) :
    ∫ ω, ‖setup.outerProcess 0 setup.m ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
      (1 - η * μ) ^ setup.m * ‖setup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2
      + η * σeff ^ 2 / μ := by
  -- For epoch 0, the snapshot is w₀ (deterministic)
  -- We can directly apply svrg_convergence_inner_strongly_convex
  -- by constructing an SVRGSetup with the fixed snapshot
  let svrgSetup : SVRGSetup E S Ω :=
    { toSGDSetup := setup.toSGDSetup }
  have h_snap : setup.outerProcess 0 0 = fun _ => setup.toSGDSetup.w₀ := by
    simp [SVRGOuterLoopSetup.outerProcess]
  -- The key observation: for epoch 0, outerProcess 0 t = svrgProcess w₀ (gradF w₀) t
  have h_process_eq : ∀ t, setup.outerProcess 0 t =
      svrgSetup.svrgProcess setup.toSGDSetup.w₀ (setup.toSGDSetup.gradF setup.toSGDSetup.w₀) t := by
    intro t
    induction t with
    | zero =>
        simp [SVRGOuterLoopSetup.outerProcess, SVRGSetup.svrgProcess, sgdProcess]
    | succ t ih =>
        simp only [SVRGOuterLoopSetup.outerProcess, SVRGSetup.svrgProcess, sgdProcess]
        simp [SVRGSetup.svrgOracle, ih, h_snap]
        congr

  -- Apply the inner-loop convergence theorem
  have hunb_eff : IsUnbiased
      (fun w s => setup.toSGDSetup.gradL w s - setup.toSGDSetup.gradL setup.toSGDSetup.w₀ s +
        setup.toSGDSetup.gradF setup.toSGDSetup.w₀)
      setup.toSGDSetup.gradF setup.sampleDist := by
    -- Prove unbiasedness for the epoch-0 oracle
    intro w
    have h_int_w : Integrable (setup.toSGDSetup.gradL w) setup.sampleDist := h_intL w
    have h_int_w0 : Integrable (setup.toSGDSetup.gradL setup.toSGDSetup.w₀) setup.sampleDist := h_intL setup.toSGDSetup.w₀
    calc
      ∫ s, (setup.toSGDSetup.gradL w s - setup.toSGDSetup.gradL setup.toSGDSetup.w₀ s +
          setup.toSGDSetup.gradF setup.toSGDSetup.w₀) ∂setup.sampleDist
        = ∫ s, setup.toSGDSetup.gradL w s ∂setup.sampleDist -
            ∫ s, setup.toSGDSetup.gradL setup.toSGDSetup.w₀ s ∂setup.sampleDist +
            ∫ s, setup.toSGDSetup.gradF setup.toSGDSetup.w₀ ∂setup.sampleDist := by
              rw [integral_add (h_int_w.sub h_int_w0) (integrable_const _)]
              rw [integral_sub h_int_w h_int_w0]
        _ = setup.toSGDSetup.gradF w - setup.toSGDSetup.gradF setup.toSGDSetup.w₀ +
            setup.toSGDSetup.gradF setup.toSGDSetup.w₀ := by
              rw [hunb w, hunb setup.toSGDSetup.w₀]
              simp [integral_const, probReal_univ]
        _ = setup.toSGDSetup.gradF w := by abel
  -- Now apply svrg_convergence_inner_strongly_convex
  have h_inner := svrg_convergence_inner_strongly_convsvrgSetup f L μ σeff η
      wStar setup.toSGDSetup.w₀ (setup.toSGDSetup.gradF setup.toSGDSetup.w₀)
      (by rfl) hgrad hsmooth hsc hvar_eff hunb hmin h_sample_prob
      hμ_pos hη_pos _hη_L hημ hη setup.m hgL h_intL
      (fun w => by
        -- Integrability of effective oracle
        have h1 : Integrable (setup.toSGDSetup.gradL w) setup.sampleDist := h_intL w
        have h2 : Integrable (setup.toSGDSetup.gradL setup.toSGDSetup.w₀) setup.sampleDist := h_intL setup.toSGDSetup.w₀
        exact h1.sub h2 |>.add (integrable_const _))
      (fun t => by
        simpa [h_process_eq t] using h_int_sq t)
      (fun t => by
        simpa [h_process_eq t] using h_int_norm_sq t)
      (fun t => by
        simpa [h_process_eq t] using h_int_inner t)
      (fun t => by
        simpa [h_process_eq t] using h_int_gF_inner t)
  -- Connect back to outerProcess
  calc

      = ∫ ω, ‖svrgSetup.svrgProcess setup.toSGDSetup.w₀ (setup.toSGDSetup.gradF setup.toSGDSetup.w₀) setup.m ω - wStar‖ ^ 2
          ∂setup.toSGDSetup.P := by
            congr
            ext ω
            exact congr_fun (h_process_eq setup.m) ω
    _ ≤ (1 - η * μ) ^ setup.m * ‖setup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η * σeff ^ 2 / μ := h_inner

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 4: Outer Loop Convergence (Main Theorem - epoch 0 only for now)
-- ============================================================================

/-- SVRG outer-loop convergence for K=1 (single epoch).

This is a simplified version proving the base case.
The full K-epoch theorem requires handling random snapshots.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop convergence` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, main theorem) -/
theorem svrg_outer_convergence_single_epoch
    (setup : SVRGOuterLoopSetup E S Ω) (f : E → ℝ) {L : NNReal} {μ σeff η : ℝ}
    (wStar : E)
    (hgrad : IsGradientOf f setup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
    (hsmooth : IsLSmooth setup.toSGDSetup.gradF L)
    (hsc : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ f)
    (hunb : IsUnbiased setup.toSGDSetup.gradL setup.toSGDSetup.gradF setup.sampleDist)
    (hmin : IsMinimizer f wStar)
    (h_sample_prob : IsProbabilityMeasure setup.sampleDist)
    (hμ_pos : 0 < μ) (hη_pos : 0 < η) (_hη_L : η ≤ 1 / (L : ℝ))
    (hημ : η * μ < 1) (hη : ∀ t, setup.toSGDSetup.η t = η)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (h_intL : ∀ w, Integrable (setup.toSGDSetup.gradL w) setup.sampleDist)
    (h_int_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.toSGDSetup.gradL (setup.outerProcess 0 t ω) (setup.toSGDSetup.ξ t ω) -
          setup.toSGDSetup.gradL setup.toSGDSetup.w₀ (setup.toSGDSetup.ξ t ω) +
          setup.toSGDSetup.gradF setup.toSGDSetup.w₀‖ ^ 2) setup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.outerProcess 0 t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_inner : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ⟪setup.outerProcess 0 t ω - wStar,
          setup.toSGDSetup.gradL (setup.outerProcess 0 t ω) (setup.toSGDSetup.ξ t ω) -
          setup.toSGDSetup.gradL setup.toSGDSetup.w₀ (setup.toSGDSetup.ξ t ω) +
          setup.toSGDSetup.gradF setup.toSGDSetup.w₀⟫_ℝ) setup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_gF_inner : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ⟪setup.outerProcess 0 t ω - wStar,
          setup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.outerProcess 0 t ω)⟫_ℝ) setup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (hvar_eff : HasBoundedVariance
        (fun w s => setup.toSGDSetup.gradL w s - setup.toSGDSetup.gradL setup.toSGDSetup.w₀ s +
          setup.toSGDSetup.gradF setup.toSGDSetup.w₀)
        setup.sampleDist σeff) :
    ∫ ω, ‖setup.outerProcess 1 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
      (1 - η * μ) ^ setup.m * ‖setup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2
      + η * σeff ^ 2 / μ := by
  -- outerProcess 1 0 = outerProcess 0 m (by definition)
  simp [SVRGOuterLoopSetup.outerProcess]
  -- Apply epoch-0 contraction
  exact svrg_epoch_contraction_epoch0 setup f wStar hgrad hsmooth hsc hunb hmin
    h_sample_prob hμ_pos hη_pos _hη_L hημ hη hgL h_intL h_int_sq h_int_norm_sq
    h_int_inner h_int_gF_inner hvar_eff

end SVRGOuterLoopSetup

### Option B: Conditional expectation

      (1 - η * μ) ^ setup.m * ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess setup k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P +

variable {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
  [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E] [SecondCountableTopology E]
variable {S : Type*} [MeasurableSpace S]
variable {Ω : Type*} [MeasurableSpace Ω]

/-- Measurability of svrgProcess with random snapshot parameters.

When the snapshot wTilde and gradient gradLTilde are random variables (measurable functions Ω → E),
the resulting process remains measurable. This bridges the gap between the fixed-parameter
svrgProcess_measurable and the outer-loop where snapshots are iterate-dependent.

Used in: `outerProcess_measurable` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, Step 4) -/
theorem svrgProcess_measurable_random_snapshot
    (setup : SVRGSetup E S Ω)
    (wTilde gradLTilde : Ω → E)
    (hwTilde : Measurable wTilde)
    (hgradLTilde : Measurable gradLTilde)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (t : ℕ) :
    Measurable (fun ω => setup.svrgProcess (wTilde ω) (gradLTilde ω) t ω) := by
  induction t with
  | zero =>
      simp [SVRGSetup.svrgProcess, sgdProcess]
      exact measurable_const
  | succ t ih =>
      simp [SVRGSetup.svrgProcess, sgdProcess, sgdProcess_succ]
      have h_oracle_meas : Measurable (fun ω =>
          setup.toSGDSetup.gradL (setup.svrgProcess (wTilde ω) (gradLTilde ω) t ω) (setup.toSGDSetup.ξ t ω) -
          setup.toSGDSetup.gradL (wTilde ω) (setup.toSGDSetup.ξ t ω) +
          gradLTilde ω) := by
        have h_proc_meas : Measurable (fun ω => setup.svrgProcess (wTilde ω) (gradLTilde ω) t ω) := ih
        have h_xi_meas : Measurable (setup.toSGDSetup.ξ t) := setup.toSGDSetup.hξ_meas t
        have h1 : Measurable (fun ω => setup.toSGDSetup.gradL (setup.svrgProcess (wTilde ω) (gradLTilde ω) t ω) (setup.toSGDSetup.ξ t ω)) :=
          hgL.comp (h_proc_meas.prodMk h_xi_meas)
        have h2 : Measurable (fun ω => setup.toSGDSetup.gradL (wTilde ω) (setup.toSGDSetup.ξ t ω)) :=
          hgL.comp (hwTilde.prodMk h_xi_meas)
        exact (h1.sub h2).add hgradLTilde
      exact (ih.sub (h_oracle_meas.const_smul (setup.toSGDSetup.η t))).measurable

-- Staging lemmas for SVRGOuterLoop formalization.

import Lib.Glue.Probability
import Lib.Glue.Algebra
import Lib.Glue.Measurable
import Lib.Glue.Calculus
import Algorithms.SVRG
import Algorithms.SGD

open MeasureTheory

variable {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
  [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E] [SecondCountableTopology E]
variable {S : Type*} [MeasurableSpace S]
variable {Ω : Type*} [MeasurableSpace Ω]

/-- Measurability of svrgProcess with random snapshot parameters.

When the snapshot wTilde and gradient gradLTilde are random variables (measurable functions Ω → E),
the resulting process remains measurable. This bridges the gap between the fixed-parameter
svrgProcess_measurable and the outer-loop where snapshots are iterate-dependent.

Used in: `outerProcess_measurable` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, Step 4) -/
theorem svrgProcess_measurable_random_snapshot
    (setup : SVRGSetup E S Ω)
    (wTilde gradLTilde : Ω → E)
    (hwTilde : Measurable wTilde)
    (hgradLTilde : Measurable gradLTilde)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (t : ℕ) :
    Measurable (fun ω => setup.svrgProcess (wTilde ω) (gradLTilde ω) t ω) := by
  induction t with
  | zero =>
      simp [SVRGSetup.svrgProcess, sgdProcess]
      exact measurable_const
  | succ t ih =>
      simp [SVRGSetup.svrgProcess, sgdProcess, sgdProcess_succ]
      have h_oracle_meas : Measurable (fun ω =>
          setup.toSGDSetup.gradL (setup.svrgProcess (wTilde ω) (gradLTilde ω) t ω) (setup.toSGDSetup.ξ t ω) -
          setup.toSGDSetup.gradL (wTilde ω) (setup.toSGDSetup.ξ t ω) +
          gradLTilde ω) := by
        have h_proc_meas : Measurable (fun ω => setup.svrgProcess (wTilde ω) (gradLTilde ω) t ω) := ih
        have h_xi_meas : Measurable (setup.toSGDSetup.ξ t) := setup.toSGDSetup.hξ_meas t
        have h1 : Measurable (fun ω => setup.toSGDSetup.gradL (setup.svrgProcess (wTilde ω) (gradLTilde ω) t ω) (setup.toSGDSetup.ξ t ω)) :=
          hgL.comp (h_proc_meas.prodMk h_xi_meas)
        have h2 : Measurable (fun ω => setup.toSGDSetup.gradL (wTilde ω) (setup.toSGDSetup.ξ t ω)) :=
          hgL.comp (hwTilde.prodMk h_xi_meas)
        exact (h1.sub h2).add hgradLTilde
      exact (ih.sub (h_oracle_meas.const_smul (setup.toSGDSetup.η t))).measurable

-- Staging lemmas for SVRGOuterLoop formalization.
-- Add new helper lemmas here. Do NOT modify existing Lib/Glue files.
import Lib.Glue.Probability
import Lib.Glue.Algebra
import Lib.Glue.Measurable
import Lib.Glue.Calculus
import Algorithms.SVRG
import Algorithms.SGD

open MeasureTheory

variable {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
  [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E] [SecondCountableTopology E]
variable {S : Type*} [MeasurableSpace S]
variable {Ω : Type*} [MeasurableSpace Ω]

/-- Measurability of svrgProcess with random snapshot parameters.

When the snapshot wTilde and gradient gradLTilde are random variables (measurable functions Ω → E),
the resulting process remains measurable. This bridges the gap between the fixed-parameter
svrgProcess_measurable and the outer-loop where snapshots are iterate-dependent.

Used in: `outerProcess_measurable` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, Step 4) -/
theorem svrgProcess_measurable_random_snapshot
    (setup : SVRGSetup E S Ω)
    (wTilde gradLTilde : Ω → E)
    (hwTilde : Measurable wTilde)
    (hgradLTilde : Measurable gradLTilde)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (t : ℕ) :
    Measurable (fun ω => setup.svrgProcess (wTilde ω) (gradLTilde ω) t ω) := by
  induction t with
  | zero =>
      simp [SVRGSetup.svrgProcess, sgdProcess]
      exact measurable_const
  | succ t ih =>
      simp [SVRGSetup.svrgProcess, sgdProcess, SGDSetup.process_succ]
      have h_oracle_meas : Measurable (fun ω =>
          setup.toSGDSetup.gradL (setup.svrgProcess (wTilde ω) (gradLTilde ω) t ω) (setup.toSGDSetup.ξ t ω) -
          setup.toSGDSetup.gradL (wTilde ω) (setup.toSGDSetup.ξ t ω) +
          gradLTilde ω) := by
        have h_proc_meas : Measurable (fun ω => setup.svrgProcess (wTilde ω) (gradLTilde ω) t ω) := ih
        have h_xi_meas : Measurable (setup.toSGDSetup.ξ t) := setup.toSGDSetup.hξ_meas t
        have h1 : Measurable (fun ω => setup.toSGDSetup.gradL (setup.svrgProcess (wTilde ω) (gradLTilde ω) t ω) (setup.toSGDSetup.ξ t ω)) :=
          hgL.comp (h_proc_meas.prodMk h_xi_meas)
        have h2 : Measurable (fun ω => setup.toSGDSetup.gradL (wTilde ω) (setup.toSGDSetup.ξ t ω)) :=
          hgL.comp (hwTilde.prodMk h_xi_meas)
        exact (h1.sub h2).add hgradLTilde
      exact (ih.sub (h_oracle_meas.const_smul (setup.toSGDSetup.η t))).measurable

```

-- Staging lemmas for SVRGOuterLoop formalization.
-- Add new helper lemmas here. Do NOT modify existing Lib/Glue files.
import Lib.Glue.Probability
import Lib.Glue.Algebra
import Lib.Glue.Measurable
import Lib.Glue.Calculus
import Algorithms.SVRG
import Algorithms.SGD

open MeasureTheory

variable {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
  [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E] [SecondCountableTopology E]
variable {S : Type*} [MeasurableSpace S]
variable {Ω : Type*} [MeasurableSpace Ω]

/-- Measurability of svrgProcess with random snapshot parameters.

When the snapshot wTilde and gradient gradLTilde are random variables (measurable functions Ω → E),
the resulting process remains measurable. This bridges the gap between the fixed-parameter
svrgProcess_measurable and the outer-loop where snapshots are iterate-dependent.

Used in: `outerProcess_measurable` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, Step 4) -/
theorem svrgProcess_measurable_random_snapshot
    (setup : SVRGSetup E S Ω)
    (wTilde gradLTilde : Ω → E)
    (hwTilde : Measurable wTilde)
    (hgradLTilde : Measurable gradLTilde)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (t : ℕ) :
    Measurable (fun ω => setup.svrgProcess (wTilde ω) (gradLTilde ω) t ω) := by
  induction t with
  | zero =>
      simp only [SVRGSetup.svrgProcess, SVRGSetup.process_zero, sgdProcess, sgdProcess_zero]
      exact measurable_const

import Algorithms.SVRG
import Mathlib.Algebra.Field.GeomSum
import Lib.Glue.Staging.SVRGOuterLoop

/-!
# SVRG Outer Loop — Epoch-Level Convergence Analysis

Layer: 2 (concrete algorithm proofs built on inner-loop analysis)

This file formalizes the macro-level SVRG dynamics across K epochs, where each
epoch runs m inner steps with a fixed snapshot, then updates the snapshot to
the epoch endpoint.

## Mathematical structure

**Update rule (outer loop):**
$$w_{k+1} = \text{svrgProcess}(w_k, \eta, w_k, \nabla F(w_k), \xi_{\text{epoch}}(k), m)$$

**Proof chain:**
1. Inner epoch contraction (from `svrg_convergence_inner_strongly_convex`)
2. Variance reduction bound (from `svrg_variance_reduction`)
3. Gradient norm → distance conversion (from `strongly_convex_gradient_norm_bound`)
4. Telescope over K epochs → geometric series closed form

## Archetype: B

The outer loop has a novel two-level structure:
- **Inner epoch**: Archetype A (reduces to plain SGD via `effectiveSGDSetup`)
- **Outer loop**: Archetype B (snapshot update creates iterate-dependent variance)

This requires **dual integrability** per GLUE_TRICKS.md Section 4b.
-/

open MeasureTheory ProbabilityTheory
open scoped InnerProductSpace

-- ============================================================================
-- Type parameters (file-level context)
-- ============================================================================

variable {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
  [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E] [SecondCountableTopology E]
variable {S : Type*} [MeasurableSpace S]
variable {Ω : Type*} [MeasurableSpace Ω]

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 1: SVRG Outer Loop Setup Structure
-- ============================================================================

/-- SVRG outer-loop setup: extends inner-loop setup with epoch-level sampling.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, structure definition) -/
structure SVRGOuterSetup
    (E : Type*) [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
      [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E]
    (S : Type*) [MeasurableSpace S]
    (Ω : Type*) [MeasurableSpace Ω] where
  toSVRGSetup : SVRGSetup E S Ω
  m : ℕ
  hm_pos : 0 < m
  -- Epoch-level sampling: ξ_epoch(k, j, ω) for epoch k, inner step j
  epochStream : ℕ → ℕ → Ω → S
  h_epoch_meas : ∀ k j, Measurable (epochStream k j)
  -- Independence across epochs (each epoch's sample stream is independent)
  h_epoch_indep : ∀ k₁ k₂, k₁ ≠ k₂ →
    ∀ j₁ j₂, IndepFun (epochStream k₁ j₁) (epochStream k₂ j₂) toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P
  -- Identical distribution within and across epochs
  h_epoch_ident : ∀ k j, IdentDistrib (epochStream k j) (toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.ξ 0)

import Algorithms.SVRG
import Mathlib.Algebra.Field.GeomSum
import Lib.Glue.Staging.SVRGOuterLoop

/-!
# SVRG Outer Loop — Epoch-Level Convergence Analysis

Layer: 2 (concrete algorithm proofs built on inner-loop analysis)

This file formalizes the macro-level SVRG dynamics across K epochs, where each
epoch runs m inner steps with a fixed snapshot, then updates the snapshot to
the epoch endpoint.

## Mathematical structure

**Update rule (outer loop):**
$$w_{k+1} = \text{svrgProcess}(w_k, \eta, w_k, \nabla F(w_k), \xi_{\text{epoch}}(k), m)$$

**Proof chain:**
1. Inner epoch contraction (from `svrg_convergence_inner_strongly_convex`)
2. Variance reduction bound (from `svrg_variance_reduction`)
3. Gradient norm → distance conversion (from `strongly_convex_gradient_norm_bound`)
4. Telescope over K epochs → geometric series closed form

## Archetype: B

The outer loop has a novel two-level structure:
- **Inner epoch**: Archetype A (reduces to plain SGD via `effectiveSGDSetup`)
- **Outer loop**: Archetype B (snapshot update creates iterate-dependent variance)

This requires **dual integrability** per GLUE_TRICKS.md Section 4b.
-/

open MeasureTheory ProbabilityTheory
open scoped InnerProductSpace

-- ============================================================================
-- Type parameters (file-level context)
-- ============================================================================

variable {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
  [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E] [SecondCountableTopology E]
variable {S : Type*} [MeasurableSpace S]
variable {Ω : Type*} [MeasurableSpace Ω]

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 1: SVRG Outer Loop Setup Structure
-- ============================================================================

/-- SVRG outer-loop setup: extends inner-loop setup with epoch-level sampling.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, structure definition) -/
structure SVRGOuterSetup
    (E : Type*) [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
      [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E]
    (S : Type*) [MeasurableSpace S]
    (Ω : Type*) [MeasurableSpace Ω] where
  toSVRGSetup : SVRGSetup E S Ω
  m : ℕ
  hm_pos : 0 < m
  -- Epoch-level sampling: ξ_epoch(k, j, ω) for epoch k, inner step j
  epochStream : ℕ → ℕ → Ω → S
  h_epoch_meas : ∀ k j, Measurable (epochStream k j)
  -- Independence across epochs (each epoch's sample stream is independent)
  h_epoch_indep : ∀ k₁ k₂, k₁ ≠ k₂ →
    ∀ j₁ j₂, IndepFun (epochStream k₁ j₁) (epochStream k₂ j₂) toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P
  -- Identical distribution within and across epochs
  h_epoch_ident : ∀ k j, IdentDistrib (epochStream k j) (toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.ξ 0)
    toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P

namespace SVRGOuterSetup

/-- Epoch-indexed iterate: `outerProcess k ω` is the snapshot at epoch k.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, epoch iterate definition) -/
noncomputable def outerProcess (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω) : ℕ → Ω → E
  | 0, ω => setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀
  | k + 1, ω =>
      let w_k := outerProcess setup k ω
      let gradF_wk := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF w_k
      setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess w_k gradF_wk setup.m ω

omit [SecondCountableTopology E] in
@[simp] theorem outerProcess_zero (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω) :
    outerProcess setup 0 = fun _ => setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ := rfl

omit [SecondCountableTopology E] in
@[simp] theorem outerProcess_succ (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω) (k : ℕ) :
    outerProcess setup (k + 1) = fun ω =>
      setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess setup k ω)
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess setup k ω))
        setup.m ω := rfl

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 2: Measurability and Independence Infrastructure
-- ============================================================================

/-- Measurability of epoch iterates.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, Step 4 — measurability bridge) -/
theorem outerProcess_measurable
    (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (hgF : Measurable setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF) (k : ℕ) :
    Measurable (outerProcess setup k) := by
  induction k with
  | zero => exact measurable_const
  | succ k ih =>
      have h_wk_meas : Measurable (outerProcess setup k) := ih
      have h_gradF_wk_meas : Measurable (fun ω => setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess setup k ω)) :=
        hgF.comp h_wk_meas
      -- BRIDGE LEMMA NEEDED: svrgProcess_measurable_random_snapshot
      sorry

/-- Independence of epoch k iterate from epoch k samples.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, Step 4 — independence bridge) -/
theorem outerProcess_indepFun_epoch
    (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (hgF : Measurable setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF) (k : ℕ) :
    ∀ j, IndepFun (outerProcess setup k) (setup.epochStream k j) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := by
  intro j
  sorry

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 3: Epoch Contraction Factor
-- ============================================================================

/-- Epoch contraction factor: ρ = (1-ημ)^m + η·(variance terms)/μ.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, contraction factor definition) -/
noncomputable def epochContractionFactor (η μ : ℝ) (L : NNReal) (m : ℕ) : ℝ :=
  (1 - η * μ) ^ m + η * (4 * (L : ℝ) ^ 2 / μ + 2 * (L : ℝ) ^ 2) / μ

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 4: Main Outer-Loop Convergence Theorem
-- ============================================================================

/-- SVRG outer-loop convergence: epoch-to-epoch contraction telescoped over K epochs.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, Step 6 — main convergence theorem) -/
theorem svrg_outer_convergence
    (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω) (f : E → ℝ) {L : NNReal} {μ σ η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    (hgrad : IsGradientOf f setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
    (hsmooth : IsLSmooth setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF L)
    (hsc : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ f)
    (hvar : HasBoundedVariance setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist σ)
    (hunb : IsUnbiased setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist)
    (hmin : IsMinimizer f wStar)
    (h_sample_prob : IsProbabilityMeasure setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist)
    (hμ_pos : 0 < μ) (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hη_L : η ≤ 1 / (2 * (L : ℝ)))
    (hημ : η * μ < 1)
    (K : ℕ) (hK_pos : 0 < K)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (hgF : Measurable setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
    (h_intL : ∀ w, Integrable (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL w) setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist)
    (h_int_epoch_end : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω => ‖outerProcess setup k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2)
      setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_snapshot : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω =>
      ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess setup k ω)
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess setup k ω))
        setup.m ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P) :
    ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess setup K ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
      (epochContractionFactor η μ L setup.m) ^ K * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 := by
  haveI := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.hP
  set ρ := epochContractionFactor η μ L setup.m with hρ_def
  
  have h_epoch_contract : ∀ k < K,
      ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess setup (k + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
        ρ * ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess setup k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := by
    intro k hk
    sorry
  
  have h_telescope :
      ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess setup K ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
        ρ ^ K * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 := by
    induction K with
    | zero =>
      simp only [outerProcess_zero setup, pow_zero, one_mul]
      rw [integral_const, smul_eq_mul, probReal_univ, one_mul]
    | succ K ih =>
        have h_contract := h_epoch_contract K (Nat.lt_succ_self K)
        calc ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess setup (K + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P
            ≤ ρ * ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess setup K ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := h_contract
          _ ≤ ρ * (ρ ^ K * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2) := by
              gcongr
          _ = ρ ^ (K + 1) * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 := by
              ring
  
  exact h_telescope

end SVRGOuterSetup

import Algorithms.SVRG
import Mathlib.Algebra.Field.GeomSum
import Lib.Glue.Staging.SVRGOuterLoop

/-!
# SVRG Outer Loop — Epoch-Level Convergence Analysis

Layer: 2 (concrete algorithm proofs built on inner-loop analysis)

This file formalizes the macro-level SVRG dynamics across K epochs, where each
epoch runs m inner steps with a fixed snapshot, then updates the snapshot to
the epoch endpoint.

## Mathematical structure

**Update rule (outer loop):**
$$w_{k+1} = \text{svrgProcess}(w_k, \eta, w_k, \nabla F(w_k), \xi_{\text{epoch}}(k), m)$$

**Proof chain:**
1. Inner epoch contraction (from `svrg_convergence_inner_strongly_convex`)
2. Variance reduction bound (from `svrg_variance_reduction`)
3. Gradient norm → distance conversion (from `strongly_convex_gradient_norm_bound`)
4. Telescope over K epochs → geometric series closed form

## Archetype: B

The outer loop has a novel two-level structure:
- **Inner epoch**: Archetype A (reduces to plain SGD via `effectiveSGDSetup`)
- **Outer loop**: Archetype B (snapshot update creates iterate-dependent variance)

This requires **dual integrability** per GLUE_TRICKS.md Section 4b.
-/

open MeasureTheory ProbabilityTheory
open scoped InnerProductSpace

-- ============================================================================
-- Type parameters (file-level context)
-- ============================================================================

variable {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
  [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E] [SecondCountableTopology E]
variable {S : Type*} [MeasurableSpace S]
variable {Ω : Type*} [MeasurableSpace Ω]

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 1: SVRG Outer Loop Setup Structure
-- ============================================================================

/-- SVRG outer-loop setup: extends inner-loop setup with epoch-level sampling.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, structure definition) -/
structure SVRGOuterSetup
    (E : Type*) [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
      [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E]
    (S : Type*) [MeasurableSpace S]
    (Ω : Type*) [MeasurableSpace Ω] where
  toSVRGSetup : SVRGSetup E S Ω
  m : ℕ
  hm_pos : 0 < m
  -- Epoch-level sampling: ξ_epoch(k, j, ω) for epoch k, inner step j
  epochStream : ℕ → ℕ → Ω → S
  h_epoch_meas : ∀ k j, Measurable (epochStream k j)
  -- Independence across epochs (each epoch's sample stream is independent)
  h_epoch_indep : ∀ k₁ k₂, k₁ ≠ k₂ →
    ∀ j₁ j₂, IndepFun (epochStream k₁ j₁) (epochStream k₂ j₂) toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P
  -- Identical distribution within and across epochs
  h_epoch_ident : ∀ k j, IdentDistrib (epochStream k j) (toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.ξ 0)
    toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P

namespace SVRGOuterSetup

/-- Epoch-indexed iterate: `outerProcess k ω` is the snapshot at epoch k.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, epoch iterate definition) -/
noncomputable def outerProcess (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω) : ℕ → Ω → E
  | 0, ω => setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀
  | k + 1, ω =>
      let w_k := outerProcess setup k ω
      let gradF_wk := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF w_k
      setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess w_k gradF_wk setup.m ω

omit [SecondCountableTopology E] in
@[simp] theorem outerProcess_zero (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω) :
    outerProcess setup 0 = fun _ => setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ := rfl

omit [SecondCountableTopology E] in
@[simp] theorem outerProcess_succ (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω) (k : ℕ) :
    outerProcess setup (k + 1) = fun ω =>
      setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess setup k ω)
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess setup k ω))
        setup.m ω := rfl

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 2: Measurability and Independence Infrastructure
-- ============================================================================

/-- Measurability of epoch iterates.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, Step 4 — measurability bridge) -/
theorem outerProcess_measurable
    (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (hgF : Measurable setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF) (k : ℕ) :
    Measurable (outerProcess setup k) := by

/-- Independence of epoch k iterate from epoch k samples.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, Step 4 — independence bridge) -/
theorem outerProcess_indepFun_epoch

    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (hgF : Measurable setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF) (k : ℕ) :

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, contraction factor definition) -/

import Algorithms.SVRG
import Mathlib.Algebra.Field.GeomSum
import Lib.Glue.Staging.SVRGOuterLoop

/-!
# SVRG Outer Loop — Epoch-Level Convergence Analysis

Layer: 2 (concrete algorithm proofs built on inner-loop analysis)

This file formalizes the macro-level SVRG dynamics across K epochs, where each
epoch runs m inner steps with a fixed snapshot, then updates the snapshot to
the epoch endpoint.

## Mathematical structure

**Update rule (outer loop):**
$$w_{k+1} = \text{svrgProcess}(w_k, \eta, w_k, \nabla F(w_k), \xi_{\text{epoch}}(k), m)$$

**Proof chain:**
1. Inner epoch contraction (from `svrg_convergence_inner_strongly_convex`)
2. Variance reduction bound (from `svrg_variance_reduction`)
3. Gradient norm → distance conversion (from `strongly_convex_gradient_norm_bound`)
4. Telescope over K epochs → geometric series closed form

## Archetype: B

The outer loop has a novel two-level structure:
- **Inner epoch**: Archetype A (reduces to plain SGD via `effectiveSGDSetup`)
- **Outer loop**: Archetype B (snapshot update creates iterate-dependent variance)

This requires **dual integrability** per GLUE_TRICKS.md Section 4b.
-/

open MeasureTheory ProbabilityTheory
open scoped InnerProductSpace

-- ============================================================================
-- Type parameters (file-level context)
-- ============================================================================

variable {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
  [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E] [SecondCountableTopology E]
variable {S : Type*} [MeasurableSpace S]
variable {Ω : Type*} [MeasurableSpace Ω]

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 1: SVRG Outer Loop Setup Structure
-- ============================================================================

/-- SVRG outer-loop setup: extends inner-loop setup with epoch-level sampling.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, structure definition) -/
structure SVRGOuterSetup
    (E : Type*) [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
      [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E]
    (S : Type*) [MeasurableSpace S]
    (Ω : Type*) [MeasurableSpace Ω] where
  toSVRGSetup : SVRGSetup E S Ω
  m : ℕ
  hm_pos : 0 < m
  -- Epoch-level sampling: ξ_epoch(k, j, ω) for epoch k, inner step j
  epochStream : ℕ → ℕ → Ω → S
  h_epoch_meas : ∀ k j, Measurable (epochStream k j)
  -- Independence across epochs (each epoch's sample stream is independent)
  h_epoch_indep : ∀ k₁ k₂, k₁ ≠ k₂ →
    ∀ j₁ j₂, IndepFun (epochStream k₁ j₁) (epochStream k₂ j₂) toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P
  -- Identical distribution within and across epochs
  h_epoch_ident : ∀ k j, IdentDistrib (epochStream k j) (toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.ξ 0)
    toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P

namespace SVRGOuterSetup

/-- Epoch-indexed iterate: `outerProcess k ω` is the snapshot at epoch k.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, epoch iterate definition) -/
noncomputable def outerProcess (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω) : ℕ → Ω → E
  | 0, ω => setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀
  | k + 1, ω =>
      let w_k := outerProcess setup k ω
      let gradF_wk := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF w_k
      setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess w_k gradF_wk setup.m ω

omit [SecondCountableTopology E] in
@[simp] theorem outerProcess_zero (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω) :
    outerProcess setup 0 = fun _ => setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ := rfl

omit [SecondCountableTopology E] in
@[simp] theorem outerProcess_succ (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω) (k : ℕ) :
    outerProcess setup (k + 1) = fun ω =>
      setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess setup k ω)
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess setup k ω))
        setup.m ω := rfl

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 2: Measurability and Independence Infrastructure
-- ============================================================================

/-- Measurability of epoch iterates.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, Step 4 — measurability bridge) -/
theorem outerProcess_measurable
    (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (hgF : Measurable setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF) (k : ℕ) :
    Measurable (outerProcess setup k) := by
  induction k with
  | zero => exact measurable_const
  | succ k ih =>
      have h_wk_meas : Measurable (outerProcess setup k) := ih
      have h_gradF_wk_meas : Measurable (fun ω => setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess setup k ω)) :=
        hgF.comp h_wk_meas
      -- Apply staging lemma: svrgProcess with random snapshot (w_k, gradF w_k)
      simpa [SVRGOuterSetup.outerProcess, SVRGSetup.svrgProcess] using
        svrgProcess_measurable_random_snapshot setup.toSVRGSetup
          (outerProcess setup k) (fun ω => setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess setup k ω))
          h_wk_meas h_gradF_wk_meas hgL setup.m

/-- Independence of epoch k iterate from epoch k samples.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, Step 4 — independence bridge) -/
theorem outerProcess_indepFun_epoch
    (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (hgF : Measurable setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF) (k : ℕ) :
    ∀ j, IndepFun (outerProcess setup k) (setup.epochStream k j) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := by
  intro j
  sorry

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 3: Epoch Contraction Factor
-- ============================================================================

/-- Epoch contraction factor: ρ = (1-ημ)^m + η·(variance terms)/μ.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, contraction factor definition) -/
noncomputable def epochContractionFactor (η μ : ℝ) (L : NNReal) (m : ℕ) : ℝ :=
  (1 - η * μ) ^ m + η * (4 * (L : ℝ) ^ 2 / μ + 2 * (L : ℝ) ^ 2) / μ

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 4: Main Outer-Loop Convergence Theorem
-- ============================================================================

/-- SVRG outer-loop convergence: epoch-to-epoch contraction telescoped over K epochs.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, Step 6 — main convergence theorem) -/
theorem svrg_outer_convergence
    (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω) (f : E → ℝ) {L : NNReal} {μ σ η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    (hgrad : IsGradientOf f setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
    (hsmooth : IsLSmooth setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF L)
    (hsc : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ f)
    (hvar : HasBoundedVariance setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist σ)
    (hunb : IsUnbiased setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist)
    (hmin : IsMinimizer f wStar)
    (h_sample_prob : IsProbabilityMeasure setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist)
    (hμ_pos : 0 < μ) (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hη_L : η ≤ 1 / (2 * (L : ℝ)))
    (hημ : η * μ < 1)
    (K : ℕ) (hK_pos : 0 < K)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (hgF : Measurable setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
    (h_intL : ∀ w, Integrable (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL w) setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist)
    (h_int_epoch_end : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω => ‖outerProcess setup k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2)
      setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_snapshot : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω =>
      ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess setup k ω)
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess setup k ω))
        setup.m ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P) :
    ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess setup K ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
      (epochContractionFactor η μ L setup.m) ^ K * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 := by
  haveI := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.hP
  set ρ := epochContractionFactor η μ L setup.m with hρ_def
  
  have h_epoch_contract : ∀ k < K,
      ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess setup (k + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
        ρ * ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess setup k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := by
    intro k hk

import Algorithms.SVRG
import Mathlib.Algebra.Field.GeomSum
import Lib.Glue.Staging.SVRGOuterLoop

/-!
# SVRG Outer Loop — Epoch-Level Convergence Analysis

Layer: 2 (concrete algorithm proofs built on inner-loop analysis)

This file formalizes the macro-level SVRG dynamics across K epochs, where each
epoch runs m inner steps with a fixed snapshot, then updates the snapshot to
the epoch endpoint.

## Mathematical structure

**Update rule (outer loop):**
$$w_{k+1} = \text{svrgProcess}(w_k, \eta, w_k, \nabla F(w_k), \xi_{\text{epoch}}(k), m)$$

**Proof chain:**
1. Inner epoch contraction (from `svrg_convergence_inner_strongly_convex`)
2. Variance reduction bound (from `svrg_variance_reduction`)
3. Gradient norm → distance conversion (from `strongly_convex_gradient_norm_bound`)
4. Telescope over K epochs → geometric series closed form

## Archetype: B

The outer loop has a novel two-level structure:
- **Inner epoch**: Archetype A (reduces to plain SGD via `effectiveSGDSetup`)
- **Outer loop**: Archetype B (snapshot update creates iterate-dependent variance)

This requires **dual integrability** per GLUE_TRICKS.md Section 4b.
-/

open MeasureTheory ProbabilityTheory
open scoped InnerProductSpace

-- ============================================================================
-- Type parameters (file-level context)
-- ============================================================================

variable {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
  [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E] [SecondCountableTopology E]
variable {S : Type*} [MeasurableSpace S]
variable {Ω : Type*} [MeasurableSpace Ω]

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 1: SVRG Outer Loop Setup Structure
-- ============================================================================

/-- SVRG outer-loop setup: extends inner-loop setup with epoch-level sampling.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, structure definition) -/
structure SVRGOuterSetup
    (E : Type*) [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
      [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E]
    (S : Type*) [MeasurableSpace S]
    (Ω : Type*) [MeasurableSpace Ω] where
  toSVRGSetup : SVRGSetup E S Ω
  m : ℕ
  hm_pos : 0 < m
  -- Epoch-level sampling: ξ_epoch(k, j, ω) for epoch k, inner step j
  epochStream : ℕ → ℕ → Ω → S
  h_epoch_meas : ∀ k j, Measurable (epochStream k j)
  -- Independence across epochs (each epoch's sample stream is independent)
  h_epoch_indep : ∀ k₁ k₂, k₁ ≠ k₂ →
    ∀ j₁ j₂, IndepFun (epochStream k₁ j₁) (epochStream k₂ j₂) toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P
  -- Identical distribution within and across epochs
  h_epoch_ident : ∀ k j, IdentDistrib (epochStream k j) (toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.ξ 0)
    toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P

namespace SVRGOuterSetup

/-- Epoch-indexed iterate: `outerProcess k ω` is the snapshot at epoch k.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, epoch iterate definition) -/
noncomputable def outerProcess (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω) : ℕ → Ω → E
  | 0, ω => setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀
  | k + 1, ω =>
      let w_k := outerProcess setup k ω
      let gradF_wk := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF w_k
      setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess w_k gradF_wk setup.m ω

omit [SecondCountableTopology E] in
@[simp] theorem outerProcess_zero (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω) :
    outerProcess setup 0 = fun _ => setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ := rfl

omit [SecondCountableTopology E] in
@[simp] theorem outerProcess_succ (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω) (k : ℕ) :
    outerProcess setup (k + 1) = fun ω =>
      setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess setup k ω)
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess setup k ω))
        setup.m ω := rfl

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 2: Measurability and Independence Infrastructure
-- ============================================================================

/-- Measurability of epoch iterates.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, Step 4 — measurability bridge) -/
theorem outerProcess_measurable
    (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (hgF : Measurable setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF) (k : ℕ) :
    Measurable (outerProcess setup k) := by
  induction k with
  | zero => exact measurable_const
  | succ k ih =>
      have h_wk_meas : Measurable (outerProcess setup k) := ih
      have h_gradF_wk_meas : Measurable (fun ω => setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess setup k ω)) :=
        hgF.comp h_wk_meas
      -- Apply staging lemma: svrgProcess with random snapshot (w_k, gradF w_k)
      simpa [SVRGOuterSetup.outerProcess, SVRGSetup.svrgProcess] using
        svrgProcess_measurable_random_snapshot setup.toSVRGSetup
          (outerProcess setup k) (fun ω => setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess setup k ω))
          h_wk_meas h_gradF_wk_meas hgL setup.m

/-- Independence of epoch k iterate from epoch k samples.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, Step 4 — independence bridge) -/
theorem outerProcess_indepFun_epoch
    (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (hgF : Measurable setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF) (k : ℕ) :
    ∀ j, IndepFun (outerProcess setup k) (setup.epochStream k j) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := by
  intro j
  sorry

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 3: Epoch Contraction Factor
-- ============================================================================

/-- Epoch contraction factor: ρ = (1-ημ)^m + η·(variance terms)/μ.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, contraction factor definition) -/
noncomputable def epochContractionFactor (η μ : ℝ) (L : NNReal) (m : ℕ) : ℝ :=
  (1 - η * μ) ^ m + η * (4 * (L : ℝ) ^ 2 / μ + 2 * (L : ℝ) ^ 2) / μ

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 4: Main Outer-Loop Convergence Theorem
-- ============================================================================

/-- SVRG outer-loop convergence: epoch-to-epoch contraction telescoped over K epochs.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, Step 6 — main convergence theorem) -/
theorem svrg_outer_convergence
    (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω) (f : E → ℝ) {L : NNReal} {μ σ η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    (hgrad : IsGradientOf f setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
    (hsmooth : IsLSmooth setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF L)
    (hsc : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ f)
    (hvar : HasBoundedVariance setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist σ)
    (hunb : IsUnbiased setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist)
    (hmin : IsMinimizer f wStar)
    (h_sample_prob : IsProbabilityMeasure setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist)
    (hμ_pos : 0 < μ) (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hη_L : η ≤ 1 / (2 * (L : ℝ)))
    (hημ : η * μ < 1)
    (K : ℕ) (hK_pos : 0 < K)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (hgF : Measurable setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
    (h_intL : ∀ w, Integrable (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL w) setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist)
    (h_int_epoch_end : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω => ‖outerProcess setup k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2)
      setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_snapshot : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω =>
      ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess setup k ω)
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess setup k ω))
        setup.m ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P) :
    ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess setup K ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
      (epochContractionFactor η μ L setup.m) ^ K * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 := by
  haveI := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.hP
  set ρ := epochContractionFactor η μ L setup.m with hρ_def
  
  have h_epoch_contract : ∀ k < K,
      ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess setup (k + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
        ρ * ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess setup k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := by
    intro k hk
    sorry
  
  have h_telescope :
      ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess setup K ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
        ρ ^ K * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 := by
    induction K with
    | zero =>
      simp only [outerProcess_zero setup, pow_zero, one_mul]
      rw [integral_const, smul_eq_mul, probReal_univ, one_mul]
    | succ K ih =>
        have h_contract := h_epoch_contract K (Nat.lt_succ_self K)
        have hρ_nonneg : 0 ≤ ρ := by
          rw [hρ_def, epochContractionFactor]
          positivity
        calc ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess setup (K + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P
            ≤ ρ * ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess setup K ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := h_contract
          _ ≤ ρ * (ρ ^ K * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2) := by
              gcongr
              · exact hρ_nonneg
          _ = ρ ^ (K + 1) * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 := by
              ring
  
  exact h_telescope

end SVRGOuterSetup

      [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E]
    (S : Type*) [MeasurableSpace S]
    (Ω : Type*) [MeasurableSpace Ω] where
  toSVRGSetup : SVRGSetup E S Ω
  m : ℕ
  hm_pos : 0 < m
  -- Epoch-level sampling: ξ_epoch(k, j, ω) for epoch k, inner step j
  epochStream : ℕ → ℕ → Ω → S
  h_epoch_meas : ∀ k j, Measurable (epochStream k j)
  -- Independence across epochs (each epoch's sample stream is independent)
  h_epoch_indep : ∀ k₁ k₂, k₁ ≠ k₂ →
    ∀ j₁ j₂, IndepFun (epochStream k₁ j₁) (epochStream k₂ j₂) toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P
  -- Identical distribution within and across epochs
  h_epoch_ident : ∀ k j, IdentDistrib (epochStream k j) (toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.ξ 0)
    toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P

namespace SVRGOuterSetup

/-- Epoch-indexed iterate: `outerProcess k ω` is the snapshot at epoch k.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, epoch iterate definition) -/
noncomputable def outerProcess (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω) : ℕ → Ω → E
  | 0, ω => setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀
  | k + 1, ω =>
      let w_k := outerProcess setup k ω
      let gradF_wk := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF w_k
      setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess w_k gradF_wk setup.m ω

omit [SecondCountableTopology E] in
@[simp] theorem outerProcess_zero (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω) :
    outerProcess setup 0 = fun _ => setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ := rfl

omit [SecondCountableTopology E] in
@[simp] theorem outerProcess_succ (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω) (k : ℕ) :
    outerProcess setup (k + 1) = fun ω =>
      setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess setup k ω)
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess setup k ω))
        setup.m ω := rfl

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 2: Measurability and Independence Infrastructure
-- ============================================================================

/-- Measurability of epoch iterates.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, Step 4 — measurability bridge) -/
theorem outerProcess_measurable
    (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (hgF : Measurable setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF) (k : ℕ) :
    Measurable (outerProcess setup k) := by
  induction k with
  | zero => exact measurable_const
  | succ k ih =>
      have h_wk_meas : Measurable (outerProcess setup k) := ih
      have h_gradF_wk_meas : Measurable (fun ω => setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess setup k ω)) :=
        hgF.comp h_wk_meas
      -- Apply staging lemma: svrgProcess with random snapshot (w_k, gradF w_k)
      simpa [SVRGOuterSetup.outerProcess, SVRGSetup.svrgProcess] using
        svrgProcess_measurable_random_snapshot setup.toSVRGSetup
          (outerProcess setup k) (fun ω => setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess setup k ω))
          h_wk_meas h_gradF_wk_meas hgL setup.m

/-- Independence of epoch k iterate from epoch k samples.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, Step 4 — independence bridge) -/
theorem outerProcess_indepFun_epoch
    (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (hgF : Measurable setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF) (k : ℕ) :
    ∀ j, IndepFun (outerProcess setup k) (setup.epochStream k j) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := by
  intro j
  sorry

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 3: Epoch Contraction Factor
-- ============================================================================

/-- Epoch contraction factor: ρ = (1-ημ)^m + η·(variance terms)/μ.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, contraction factor definition) -/
noncomputable def epochContractionFactor (η μ : ℝ) (L : NNReal) (m : ℕ) : ℝ :=
  (1 - η * μ) ^ m + η * (4 * (L : ℝ) ^ 2 / μ + 2 * (L : ℝ) ^ 2) / μ

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 4: Main Outer-Loop Convergence Theorem
-- ============================================================================

/-- SVRG outer-loop convergence: epoch-to-epoch contraction telescoped over K epochs.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, Step 6 — main convergence theorem) -/
theorem svrg_outer_convergence
    (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω) (f : E → ℝ) {L : NNReal} {μ σ η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    (hgrad : IsGradientOf f setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
    (hsmooth : IsLSmooth setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF L)
    (hsc : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ f)
    (hvar : HasBoundedVariance setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist σ)
    (hunb : IsUnbiased setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist)
    (hmin : IsMinimizer f wStar)
    (h_sample_prob : IsProbabilityMeasure setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist)
    (hμ_pos : 0 < μ) (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hη_L : η ≤ 1 / (2 * (L : ℝ)))
    (hημ : η * μ < 1)
    (K : ℕ) (hK_pos : 0 < K)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (hgF : Measurable setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
    (h_intL : ∀ w, Integrable (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL w) setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist)
    (h_int_epoch_end : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω => ‖outerProcess setup k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2)
      setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_snapshot : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω =>
      ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess setup k ω)
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess setup k ω))
        setup.m ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P) :
    ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess setup K ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
      (epochContractionFactor η μ L setup.m) ^ K * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 := by
  haveI := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.hP
  set ρ := epochContractionFactor η μ L setup.m with hρ_def
  
  have h_epoch_contract : ∀ k < K,
      ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess setup (k + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
        ρ * ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess setup k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := by
    intro k hk
    sorry
  
  have h_telescope :
      ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess setup K ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
        ρ ^ K * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 := by
    induction K with
    | zero =>
      simp only [outerProcess_zero setup, pow_zero, one_mul]
      rw [integral_const, smul_eq_mul, probReal_univ, one_mul]
    | succ K ih =>
        have h_contract := h_epoch_contract K (Nat.lt_succ_self K)
        have hρ_nonneg : 0 ≤ ρ := by
          rw [hρ_def, epochContractionFactor]
          positivity
        calc ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess setup (K + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P
            ≤ ρ * ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess setup K ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := h_contract
          _ ≤ ρ * (ρ ^ K * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2) := by
              gcongr
              · exact hρ_nonneg
          _ = ρ ^ (K + 1) * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 := by
              ring
  
  exact h_telescope

end SVRGOuterSetup

import Algorithms.SVRG
import Mathlib.Algebra.Field.GeomSum
import Lib.Glue.Staging.SVRGOuterLoop

/-!
# SVRG Outer Loop — Epoch-Level Convergence Analysis

Layer: 2 (concrete algorithm proofs built on inner-loop analysis)

This file formalizes the macro-level SVRG dynamics across K epochs, where each
epoch runs m inner steps with a fixed snapshot, then updates the snapshot to
the epoch endpoint.

## Mathematical structure

**Update rule (outer loop):**
$$w_{k+1} = \text{svrgProcess}(w_k, \eta, w_k, \nabla F(w_k), \xi_{\text{epoch}}(k), m)$$

**Proof chain:**
1. Inner epoch contraction (from `svrg_convergence_inner_strongly_convex`)
2. Variance reduction bound (from `svrg_variance_reduction`)
3. Gradient norm → distance conversion (from `strongly_convex_gradient_norm_bound`)
4. Telescope over K epochs → geometric series closed form

## Archetype: B

The outer loop has a novel two-level structure:
- **Inner epoch**: Archetype A (reduces to plain SGD via `effectiveSGDSetup`)
- **Outer loop**: Archetype B (snapshot update creates iterate-dependent variance)

This requires **dual integrability** per GLUE_TRICKS.md Section 4b.
-/

    (hgrad : IsGradientOf f setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF)

    (hmin : IsMinimizer f wStar)
    (h_sample_prob : IsProbabilityMeasure setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist)
    (hμ_pos : 0 < μ) (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hη_L : η ≤ 1 / (2 * (L : ℝ)))

    (hgF : Measurable setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
    (h_intL : ∀ w, Integrable (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL w) setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist)
    (h_int_epoch_end : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω => ‖outerProcess setup k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2)
      setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_snapshot : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω =>
      ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess setup k ω)
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess setup k ω))
        setup.m ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P) :

      ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess setup (k + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
        ρ * ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess setup k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := by
    intro k hk
    sorry
  
  have h_telescope :
      ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess setup K ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
        ρ ^ K * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 := by
    induction K with
    | zero =>
