```lean
import Algorithms.SVRG
import Lib.Glue.Probability

open MeasureTheory ProbabilityTheory
open scoped InnerProductSpace

variable {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
  [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E] [SecondCountableTopology E]
variable {S : Type*} [MeasurableSpace S]
variable {Ω : Type*} [MeasurableSpace Ω]

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 1: SVRG Outer Loop Setup
-- ============================================================================

/-- SVRG outer-loop setup: extends SGDSetup with inner epoch length m.

Snapshot parameters (wTilde, gradLTilde) are per-epoch, NOT structure fields,
because they are refreshed every epoch.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop convergence` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, main theorem) -/
structure SVRGOuterLoopSetup
    (E : Type*) [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
      [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E]
    (S : Type*) [MeasurableSpace S]
    (Ω : Type*) [MeasurableSpace Ω] where
  toSGDSetup : SGDSetup E S Ω
  m : ℕ
  hm_pos : 0 < m

namespace SVRGOuterLoopSetup

variable (setup : SVRGOuterLoopSetup E S Ω)

/-- Sample distribution inherited from base setup. -/
noncomputable def sampleDist : Measure S :=
  setup.toSGDSetup.sampleDist

/-- Two-index outer process: outerProcess k t = result after t inner steps of epoch k.

Convention 6 (dot notation) MUST be used: setup.outerProcess k t ω

Used in: `SVRG outer loop convergence` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, main theorem) -/
noncomputable def outerProcess (k t : ℕ) : Ω → E :=
  sgdProcess setup.toSGDSetup.w₀ setup.toSGDSetup.η
    (setup.toSGDSetup.gradL) setup.toSGDSetup.ξ (k * setup.m + t)

-- Alternative: explicit two-level recursion (more faithful to SVRG structure)
-- noncomputable def outerProcess (k t : ℕ) : Ω → E
--   | 0, 0 => setup.toSGDSetup.w₀
--   | k, 0 => setup.outerProcess (k - 1) setup.m ω  -- end of previous epoch
--   | k, t + 1 => let w_t := setup.outerProcess k t ω
--                 w_t - setup.toSGDSetup.η (k * setup.m + t) •
--                   (setup.toSGDSetup.gradL w_t (setup.toSGDSetup.ξ (k * setup.m + t) ω)
--                     - setup.toSGDSetup.gradL (setup.outerProcess k 0 ω) (setup.toSGDSetup.ξ (k * setup.m + t) ω)
--                     + setup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.outerProcess k 0 ω))

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 2: Process Infrastructure Lemmas
-- ============================================================================

/-- Measurability of outerProcess.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop convergence` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, bridge construction) -/
theorem outerProcess_measurable (k t : ℕ)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSGDSetup.gradL)) :
    Measurable (setup.outerProcess k t) := by
  sorry  -- Gap Level 2: induction on (k, t), use sgdProcess_measurable

/-- Adaptedness to sgdFiltration.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop convergence` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, filtration argument) -/
theorem outerProcess_adapted
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSGDSetup.gradL)) :
    Adapted (sgdFiltration setup.toSGDSetup.ξ setup.toSGDSetup.hξ_meas)
      (fun n => setup.outerProcess (n / setup.m) (n % setup.m)) := by
  sorry  -- Gap Level 2: reuse sgdProcess_adapted pattern

/-- Independence of outerProcess k t from fresh sample ξ_{k,t}.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop convergence` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, bridge construction) -/
lemma outerProcess_indepFun_xi (k t : ℕ)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSGDSetup.gradL)) :
    IndepFun (setup.outerProcess k t) (setup.toSGDSetup.ξ (k * setup.m + t))
      setup.toSGDSetup.P := by
  sorry  -- Gap Level 2: reuse sgdProcess_indepFun_xi pattern

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 3: Bridge to StochasticDescentHyps
-- ============================================================================

/-- Convert SVRG outer-loop state at epoch k, step t to StochasticDescentHyps.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop convergence` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, one-step interface) -/
noncomputable def svrg_outer_to_hyps (k t : ℕ)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (hgF_meas : Measurable setup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
    (hunb : IsUnbiased setup.toSGDSetup.gradL setup.toSGDSetup.gradF setup.sampleDist) :
    StochasticDescentHyps E S Ω :=
  sgd_to_hyps (setup := setup.toSGDSetup) (k * setup.m + t) hgL hgF_meas hunb

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 4: Epoch Contraction (Inner Loop Result)
-- ============================================================================

/-- One epoch of SVRG (m inner steps) contracts the distance to optimum.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop convergence` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, telescoping step) -/
theorem svrg_epoch_contraction
    (setup : SVRGOuterLoopSetup E S Ω) (f : E → ℝ) {L : NNReal} {μ σeff η : ℝ}
    (wStar wTilde gradLTilde : E)
    (hgradLTilde : gradLTilde = setup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde)
    (hgrad : IsGradientOf f setup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
    (hsmooth : IsLSmooth setup.toSGDSetup.gradF L)
    (hsc : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ f)
    (hvar_eff : HasBoundedVariance (SVRGSetup.svrgOracle (toSGDSetup := setup.toSGDSetup) wTilde gradLTilde)
        setup.sampleDist σeff)
    (hunb : IsUnbiased setup.toSGDSetup.gradL setup.toSGDSetup.gradF setup.sampleDist)
    (hmin : IsMinimizer f wStar)
    (h_sample_prob : IsProbabilityMeasure setup.sampleDist)
    (hμ_pos : 0 < μ) (hη_pos : 0 < η) (_hη_L : η ≤ 1 / (L : ℝ))
    (hημ : η * μ < 1) (hη : ∀ t, setup.toSGDSetup.η t = η)
    (k : ℕ)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (h_intL_eff : ∀ w, Integrable (SVRGSetup.svrgOracle (toSGDSetup := setup.toSGDSetup) wTilde gradLTilde w) setup.sampleDist)
    (h_int_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖SVRGSetup.svrgOracle (toSGDSetup := setup.toSGDSetup) wTilde gradLTilde
          (setup.outerProcess k t ω) (setup.toSGDSetup.ξ (k * setup.m + t) ω)‖ ^ 2) setup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.outerProcess k t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_inner : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ⟪setup.outerProcess k t ω - wStar,
          SVRGSetup.svrgOracle (toSGDSetup := setup.toSGDSetup) wTilde gradLTilde
            (setup.outerProcess k t ω) (setup.toSGDSetup.ξ (k * setup.m + t) ω)⟫_ℝ) setup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_gF_inner : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ⟪setup.outerProcess k t ω - wStar,
          setup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.outerProcess k t ω)⟫_ℝ) setup.toSGDSetup.P) :
    ∫ ω, ‖setup.outerProcess (k + 1) 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
      (1 - η * μ) ^ setup.m * ∫ ω, ‖setup.outerProcess k 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSGDSetup.P
      + η * σeff ^ 2 / μ := by
  sorry  -- Gap Level 2: call svrg_convergence_inner_strongly_convex via simpa

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 5: Outer Loop Convergence (Main Theorem)
-- ============================================================================

/-- SVRG outer-loop convergence: telescoping over K epochs.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop convergence` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, main theorem) -/
theorem svrg_outer_convergence
    (setup : SVRGOuterLoopSetup E S Ω) (f : E → ℝ) {L : NNReal} {μ σeff η : ℝ}
    (wStar : E)
    (hgrad : IsGradientOf f setup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
    (hsmooth : IsLSmooth setup.toSGDSetup.gradF L)
    (hsc : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ f)
    (hvar : HasBoundedVariance setup.toSGDSetup.gradL setup.sampleDist σeff)
    (hunb : IsUnbiased setup.toSGDSetup.gradL setup.toSGDSetup.gradF setup.sampleDist)
    (hmin : IsMinimizer f wStar)
    (h_sample_prob : IsProbabilityMeasure setup.sampleDist)
    (hμ_pos : 0 < μ) (hη_pos : 0 < η) (_hη_L : η ≤ 1 / (L : ℝ))
    (hημ : η * μ < 1) (hη : ∀ t, setup.toSGDSetup.η t = η)
    (K : ℕ)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (h_intL : ∀ w, Integrable (setup.toSGDSetup.gradL w) setup.sampleDist)
    (h_int_sq : ∀ k t, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖SVRGSetup.svrgOracle (toSGDSetup := setup.toSGDSetup) (setup.outerProcess k 0 ω)
          (setup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.outerProcess k 0 ω))
          (setup.outerProcess k t ω) (setup.toSGDSetup.ξ (k * setup.m + t) ω)‖ ^ 2) setup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ k t, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.outerProcess k t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_inner : ∀ k t, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ⟪setup.outerProcess k t ω - wStar,
          SVRGSetup.svrgOracle (toSGDSetup := setup.toSGDSetup) (setup.outerProcess k 0 ω)
            (setup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.outerProcess k 0 ω))
            (setup.outerProcess k t ω) (setup.toSGDSetup.ξ (k * setup.m + t) ω)⟫_ℝ) setup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_gF_inner : ∀ k t, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ⟪setup.outerProcess k t ω - wStar,
          setup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.outerProcess k t ω)⟫_ℝ) setup.toSGDSetup.P) :
    ∫ ω, ‖setup.outerProcess K 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
      (1 - η * μ) ^ (setup.m * K) * ‖setup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2
      + η * σeff ^ 2 / μ := by
  sorry  -- Gap Level 2: induction on K, base K=0 by simp, step K+1 by svrg_epoch_contraction + gcongr

end SVRGOuterLoopSetup
```

## 7. Proof Strategy per Sorry

### `svrg_variance_reduction` (Lib/Glue/Probability.lean)
**Gap Level:** 2 (composition of L-smooth bound + convex FOC + Young's inequality)

**Proof steps:**
1. Expand `‖gradL(w,s) − gradL(wTilde,s) + gradF(wTilde)‖²` into three terms
2. Apply `‖a − b + c‖² ≤ 2‖a − b‖² + 2‖c‖²` (Young's inequality)
3. Bound `‖gradL(w,s) − gradL(wTilde,s)‖²` using L-smoothness: `≤ L²·‖w − wTilde‖²`
4. Use `lipschitz_gradient_quadratic_bound` to relate `‖gradF(wTilde) − gradF(w*)‖²` to `f(wTilde) − f*`
5. Apply `convex_first_order_condition` to bound cross terms
6. Integrate over `s ~ ν` using `integral_add`, `integral_mono`
7. Combine constants: `4L·(f(w) − f*) + 2·‖gradF(wTilde) − gradF(w*)‖²`

**Reusable lemmas:**
- `lipschitz_gradient_quadratic_bound` (Lib/Layer0/GradientFTC.lean)
- `convex_first_order_condition` (Lib/Layer0/ConvexFOC.lean)
- `norm_add_sq_real`, `norm_sub_sq_real` (Mathlib)
- `integral_add`, `integral_mono` (Mathlib.MeasureTheory.Integral.Bochner.Basic)

### `outerProcess_measurable`
**Gap Level:** 2 (induction on (k, t), delegates to `sgdProcess_measurable`)

**Proof:** Direct application of `sgdProcess_measurable` with index `k * m + t`.

### `outerProcess_adapted`
**Gap Level:** 2 (reuse `sgdProcess_adapted` pattern)

**Proof:** Show `outerProcess k t` is measurable w.r.t. `sgdFiltration (k*m + t)`, then use filtration monotonicity.

### `outerProcess_indepFun_xi`
**Gap Level:** 2 (reuse `sgdProcess_indepFun_xi` pattern)

**Proof:** `outerProcess k t` depends only on `ξ₀, …, ξ_{k*m+t-1}`, hence independent of `ξ_{k*m+t}` by `iIndepFun`.

### `svrg_epoch_contraction`
**Gap Level:** 2 (call `svrg_convergence_inner_strongly_convex` via `simpa`)

**Proof:**
1. Recognize `setup.outerProcess (k+1) 0 = svrgProcess wTilde gradLTilde m` (end of inner epoch)
2. Call `svrg_convergence_inner_strongly_convex` with `T := m`
3. Use `simpa [SVRGOuterLoopSetup.outerProcess, SVRGSetup.svrgProcess]` to connect

### `svrg_outer_convergence`
**Gap Level:** 2 (induction on K, telescoping)

**Proof:**
1. Base K=0: `simp [outerProcess, pow_zero, one_mul]`
2. Step K→K+1:
   - Apply `svrg_epoch_contraction` at epoch K
   - Use `gcongr` with induction hypothesis
   - Simplify geometric series: `(1−ημ)^(m·K) · (1−ημ)^m = (1−ημ)^(m·(K+1))`

## 8. New Glue Needed

| `svrg_variance_reduction` | `Lib/Glue/Probability.lean` | 2 | **MUST COMPLETE** (currently sorry'd) |

# SVRG Outer Loop — Complete Proof Plan

## 1. Proof Chain

**Inner epoch (m steps, fixed snapshot wTilde = w_k):**
```
E[‖w_{k,m} − w*‖²] ≤ (1−ημ)^m · E[‖w_k − w*‖²] + η·σ_eff²/μ
```
where `σ_eff² = 4L·(f(w_k)−f*) + 2·‖gradF(w_k)−gradF(w*)‖²` from `svrg_variance_reduction`.

**Outer loop (K epochs, snapshot refresh each epoch):**
```
E[‖w_K − w*‖²] ≤ (1−ημ)^(m·K) · ‖w₀ − w*‖² + (η·σ_eff²/μ) · (1 − (1−ημ)^(m·K))
```

**Telescoping via induction on K:**
- Base K=0: `E[‖w₀ − w*‖²] = ‖w₀ − w*‖²` (definitional)
- Step K→K+1: apply `svrg_epoch_contraction` + gcongr with induction hypothesis

## 2. Archetype Classification

**Archetype B** — The outer loop has a NOVEL update structure (periodic snapshot refresh every m steps) that cannot be reduced to plain SGD via `simpa`.

**Justification:**
- **Micro level (inner epoch, m steps):** Archetype A — snapshot `(wTilde, gradLTilde)` is frozen, so `svrg_convergence_inner_strongly_convex` applies via `effectiveSGDSetup` + `simpa`.
- **Macro level (outer loop, K epochs):** Archetype B — the snapshot update `wTilde_{k+1} = w_{k+1}` creates a two-level recursion that requires a new telescoping proof. Cannot call `sgd_convergence_*` directly.

**Design pattern:** Follows `docs/GLUE_TRICKS.md` Section 4c (Snapshot Freeze = Archetype A Reduction) for the inner epoch, but requires new outer-loop infrastructure.

```lean
import Algorithms.SVRG
import Lib.Glue.Probability

open MeasureTheory ProbabilityTheory
open scoped InnerProductSpace

variable {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
  [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E] [SecondCountableTopology E]
variable {S : Type*} [MeasurableSpace S]
variable {Ω : Type*} [MeasurableSpace Ω]

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 1: SVRG Outer Loop Setup
-- ============================================================================

/-- SVRG outer-loop setup: extends SGDSetup with inner epoch length m.

Snapshot parameters (wTilde, gradLTilde) are per-epoch, NOT structure fields,
because they are refreshed every epoch.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop convergence` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, main theorem) -/
structure SVRGOuterLoopSetup
    (E : Type*) [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
      [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E]
    (S : Type*) [MeasurableSpace S]
    (Ω : Type*) [MeasurableSpace Ω] where
  toSGDSetup : SGDSetup E S Ω
  m : ℕ
  hm_pos : 0 < m

namespace SVRGOuterLoopSetup

variable (setup : SVRGOuterLoopSetup E S Ω)

/-- Sample distribution inherited from base setup. -/
noncomputable def sampleDist : Measure S :=
  setup.toSGDSetup.sampleDist

/-- Two-index outer process: outerProcess k t = result after t inner steps of epoch k.

Convention 6 (dot notation) MUST be used: setup.outerProcess k t ω

Used in: `SVRG outer loop convergence` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, main theorem) -/
noncomputable def outerProcess (k t : ℕ) : Ω → E :=
  sgdProcess setup.toSGDSetup.w₀ setup.toSGDSetup.η
    (setup.toSGDSetup.gradL) setup.toSGDSetup.ξ (k * setup.m + t)

-- Alternative: explicit two-level recursion (more faithful to SVRG structure)
-- noncomputable def outerProcess (k t : ℕ) : Ω → E
--   | 0, 0 => setup.toSGDSetup.w₀
--   | k, 0 => setup.outerProcess (k - 1) setup.m ω  -- end of previous epoch
--   | k, t + 1 => let w_t := setup.outerProcess k t ω
--                 w_t - setup.toSGDSetup.η (k * setup.m + t) •
--                   (setup.toSGDSetup.gradL w_t (setup.toSGDSetup.ξ (k * setup.m + t) ω)
--                     - setup.toSGDSetup.gradL (setup.outerProcess k 0 ω) (setup.toSGDSetup.ξ (k * setup.m + t) ω)
--                     + setup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.outerProcess k 0 ω))

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 2: Process Infrastructure Lemmas
-- ============================================================================

/-- Measurability of outerProcess.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop convergence` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, bridge construction) -/
theorem outerProcess_measurable (k t : ℕ)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSGDSetup.gradL)) :
    Measurable (setup.outerProcess k t) := by
  sorry  -- Gap Level 2: induction on (k, t), use sgdProcess_measurable

/-- Adaptedness to sgdFiltration.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop convergence` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, filtration argument) -/
theorem outerProcess_adapted
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSGDSetup.gradL)) :
    Adapted (sgdFiltration setup.toSGDSetup.ξ setup.toSGDSetup.hξ_meas)
      (fun n => setup.outerProcess (n / setup.m) (n % setup.m)) := by
  sorry  -- Gap Level 2: reuse sgdProcess_adapted pattern

/-- Independence of outerProcess k t from fresh sample ξ_{k,t}.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop convergence` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, bridge construction) -/
lemma outerProcess_indepFun_xi (k t : ℕ)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSGDSetup.gradL)) :
    IndepFun (setup.outerProcess k t) (setup.toSGDSetup.ξ (k * setup.m + t))
      setup.toSGDSetup.P := by
  sorry  -- Gap Level 2: reuse sgdProcess_indepFun_xi pattern

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 3: Bridge to StochasticDescentHyps
-- ============================================================================

/-- Convert SVRG outer-loop state at epoch k, step t to StochasticDescentHyps.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop convergence` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, one-step interface) -/
noncomputable def svrg_outer_to_hyps (k t : ℕ)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (hgF_meas : Measurable setup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
    (hunb : IsUnbiased setup.toSGDSetup.gradL setup.toSGDSetup.gradF setup.sampleDist) :
    StochasticDescentHyps E S Ω :=
  sgd_to_hyps (setup := setup.toSGDSetup) (k * setup.m + t) hgL hgF_meas hunb

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 4: Epoch Contraction (Inner Loop Result)
-- ============================================================================

/-- One epoch of SVRG (m inner steps) contracts the distance to optimum.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop convergence` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, telescoping step) -/
theorem svrg_epoch_contraction
    (setup : SVRGOuterLoopSetup E S Ω) (f : E → ℝ) {L : NNReal} {μ σeff η : ℝ}
    (wStar wTilde gradLTilde : E)
    (hgradLTilde : gradLTilde = setup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde)
    (hgrad : IsGradientOf f setup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
    (hsmooth : IsLSmooth setup.toSGDSetup.gradF L)
    (hsc : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ f)
    (hvar_eff : HasBoundedVariance (SVRGSetup.svrgOracle (toSGDSetup := setup.toSGDSetup) wTilde gradLTilde)
        setup.sampleDist σeff)
    (hunb : IsUnbiased setup.toSGDSetup.gradL setup.toSGDSetup.gradF setup.sampleDist)
    (hmin : IsMinimizer f wStar)
    (h_sample_prob : IsProbabilityMeasure setup.sampleDist)
    (hμ_pos : 0 < μ) (hη_pos : 0 < η) (_hη_L : η ≤ 1 / (L : ℝ))
    (hημ : η * μ < 1) (hη : ∀ t, setup.toSGDSetup.η t = η)
    (k : ℕ)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (h_intL_eff : ∀ w, Integrable (SVRGSetup.svrgOracle (toSGDSetup := setup.toSGDSetup) wTilde gradLTilde w) setup.sampleDist)
    (h_int_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖SVRGSetup.svrgOracle (toSGDSetup := setup.toSGDSetup) wTilde gradLTilde
          (setup.outerProcess k t ω) (setup.toSGDSetup.ξ (k * setup.m + t) ω)‖ ^ 2) setup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.outerProcess k t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_inner : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ⟪setup.outerProcess k t ω - wStar,
          SVRGSetup.svrgOracle (toSGDSetup := setup.toSGDSetup) wTilde gradLTilde
            (setup.outerProcess k t ω) (setup.toSGDSetup.ξ (k * setup.m + t) ω)⟫_ℝ) setup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_gF_inner : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ⟪setup.outerProcess k t ω - wStar,
          setup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.outerProcess k t ω)⟫_ℝ) setup.toSGDSetup.P) :
    ∫ ω, ‖setup.outerProcess (k + 1) 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
      (1 - η * μ) ^ setup.m * ∫ ω, ‖setup.outerProcess k 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSGDSetup.P
      + η * σeff ^ 2 / μ := by
  sorry  -- Gap Level 2: call svrg_convergence_inner_strongly_convex via simpa

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 5: Outer Loop Convergence (Main Theorem)
-- ============================================================================

/-- SVRG outer-loop convergence: telescoping over K epochs.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop convergence` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, main theorem) -/
theorem svrg_outer_convergence
    (setup : SVRGOuterLoopSetup E S Ω) (f : E → ℝ) {L : NNReal} {μ σeff η : ℝ}
    (wStar : E)
    (hgrad : IsGradientOf f setup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
    (hsmooth : IsLSmooth setup.toSGDSetup.gradF L)
    (hsc : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ f)
    (hvar : HasBoundedVariance setup.toSGDSetup.gradL setup.sampleDist σeff)
    (hunb : IsUnbiased setup.toSGDSetup.gradL setup.toSGDSetup.gradF setup.sampleDist)
    (hmin : IsMinimizer f wStar)
    (h_sample_prob : IsProbabilityMeasure setup.sampleDist)
    (hμ_pos : 0 < μ) (hη_pos : 0 < η) (_hη_L : η ≤ 1 / (L : ℝ))
    (hημ : η * μ < 1) (hη : ∀ t, setup.toSGDSetup.η t = η)
    (K : ℕ)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (h_intL : ∀ w, Integrable (setup.toSGDSetup.gradL w) setup.sampleDist)
    (h_int_sq : ∀ k t, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖SVRGSetup.svrgOracle (toSGDSetup := setup.toSGDSetup) (setup.outerProcess k 0 ω)
          (setup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.outerProcess k 0 ω))
          (setup.outerProcess k t ω) (setup.toSGDSetup.ξ (k * setup.m + t) ω)‖ ^ 2) setup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ k t, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.outerProcess k t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_inner : ∀ k t, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ⟪setup.outerProcess k t ω - wStar,
          SVRGSetup.svrgOracle (toSGDSetup := setup.toSGDSetup) (setup.outerProcess k 0 ω)
            (setup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.outerProcess k 0 ω))
            (setup.outerProcess k t ω) (setup.toSGDSetup.ξ (k * setup.m + t) ω)⟫_ℝ) setup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_gF_inner : ∀ k t, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ⟪setup.outerProcess k t ω - wStar,
          setup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.outerProcess k t ω)⟫_ℝ) setup.toSGDSetup.P) :
    ∫ ω, ‖setup.outerProcess K 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
      (1 - η * μ) ^ (setup.m * K) * ‖setup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2
      + η * σeff ^ 2 / μ := by
  sorry  -- Gap Level 2: induction on K, base K=0 by simp, step K+1 by svrg_epoch_contraction + gcongr

end SVRGOuterLoopSetup
```

## 7. Proof Strategy per Sorry

### `svrg_variance_reduction` (Lib/Glue/Probability.lean)
**Gap Level:** 2 (composition of L-smooth bound + convex FOC + Young's inequality)

**Proof steps:**
1. Expand `‖gradL(w,s) − gradL(wTilde,s) + gradF(wTilde)‖²` into three terms
2. Apply `‖a − b + c‖² ≤ 2‖a − b‖² + 2‖c‖²` (Young's inequality)
3. Bound `‖gradL(w,s) − gradL(wTilde,s)‖²` using L-smoothness: `≤ L²·‖w − wTilde‖²`
4. Use `lipschitz_gradient_quadratic_bound` to relate `‖gradF(wTilde) − gradF(w*)‖²` to `f(wTilde) − f*`
5. Apply `convex_first_order_condition` to bound cross terms
6. Integrate over `s ~ ν` using `integral_add`, `integral_mono`
7. Combine constants: `4L·(f(w) − f*) + 2·‖gradF(wTilde) − gradF(w*)‖²`

**Reusable lemmas:**
- `lipschitz_gradient_quadratic_bound` (Lib/Layer0/GradientFTC.lean)
- `convex_first_order_condition` (Lib/Layer0/ConvexFOC.lean)
- `norm_add_sq_real`, `norm_sub_sq_real` (Mathlib)
- `integral_add`, `integral_mono` (Mathlib.MeasureTheory.Integral.Bochner.Basic)

### `outerProcess_measurable`
**Gap Level:** 2 (induction on (k, t), delegates to `sgdProcess_measurable`)

**Proof:** Direct application of `sgdProcess_measurable` with index `k * m + t`.

### `outerProcess_adapted`
**Gap Level:** 2 (reuse `sgdProcess_adapted` pattern)

**Proof:** Show `outerProcess k t` is measurable w.r.t. `sgdFiltration (k*m + t)`, then use filtration monotonicity.

### `outerProcess_indepFun_xi`
**Gap Level:** 2 (reuse `sgdProcess_indepFun_xi` pattern)

**Proof:** `outerProcess k t` depends only on `ξ₀, …, ξ_{k*m+t-1}`, hence independent of `ξ_{k*m+t}` by `iIndepFun`.

### `svrg_epoch_contraction`
**Gap Level:** 2 (call `svrg_convergence_inner_strongly_convex` via `simpa`)

**Proof:**
1. Recognize `setup.outerProcess (k+1) 0 = svrgProcess wTilde gradLTilde m` (end of inner epoch)
2. Call `svrg_convergence_inner_strongly_convex` with `T := m`
3. Use `simpa [SVRGOuterLoopSetup.outerProcess, SVRGSetup.svrgProcess]` to connect

### `svrg_outer_convergence`
**Gap Level:** 2 (induction on K, telescoping)

**Proof:**
1. Base K=0: `simp [outerProcess, pow_zero, one_mul]`
2. Step K→K+1:
   - Apply `svrg_epoch_contraction` at epoch K
   - Use `gcongr` with induction hypothesis
   - Simplify geometric series: `(1−ημ)^(m·K) · (1−ημ)^m = (1−ημ)^(m·(K+1))`

Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean.content:
import Algorithms.SVRG
import Mathlib.Algebra.Field.GeomSum
import Lib.Glue.Staging.SVRGOuterLoop

/-!
# SVRG Outer Loop — Epoch-Level Convergence Analysis

Layer: 2 (concrete algorithm proofs built on inner-loop analysis)

This file formalizes the macro-level SVRG dynamics across K epochs, where each
epoch runs m inner steps with a fixed snapshot, then updates the snapshot to
the epoch endpoint.

## Mathematical structure

**Update rule (outer loop):**
$$w_{k+1} = \text{svrgProcess}(w_k, \eta, w_k, \nabla F(w_k), \xi_{\text{epoch}}(k), m)$$

**Proof chain:**
1. Inner epoch contraction (from `svrg_convergence_inner_strongly_convex`)
2. Variance reduction bound (from `svrg_variance_reduction`)
3. Gradient norm → distance conversion (from `strongly_convex_gradient_norm_bound`)
4. Telescope over K epochs → geometric series closed form

## Archetype: B

The outer loop has a novel two-level structure:
- **Inner epoch**: Archetype A (reduces to plain SGD via `effectiveSGDSetup`)
- **Outer loop**: Archetype B (snapshot update creates iterate-dependent variance)

This requires **dual integrability** per GLUE_TRICKS.md Section 4b.
-/

open MeasureTheory ProbabilityTheory
open scoped InnerProductSpace

-- ============================================================================
-- Type parameters (file-level context)
-- ============================================================================

variable {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
  [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E] [SecondCountableTopology E]
variable {S : Type*} [MeasurableSpace S]
variable {Ω : Type*} [MeasurableSpace Ω]

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 1: SVRG Outer Loop Setup Structure
-- ============================================================================

/-- SVRG outer-loop setup: extends inner-loop setup with epoch-level sampling.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, structure definition) -/
structure SVRGOuterSetup
    (E : Type*) [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
      [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E]
    (S : Type*) [MeasurableSpace S]
    (Ω : Type*) [MeasurableSpace Ω] where
  toSVRGSetup : SVRGSetup E S Ω
  m : ℕ
  hm_pos : 0 < m
  -- Epoch-level sampling: ξ_epoch(k, j, ω) for epoch k, inner step j
  epochStream : ℕ → ℕ → Ω → S
  h_epoch_meas : ∀ k j, Measurable (epochStream k j)
  -- Independence across epochs (each epoch's sample stream is independent)
  h_epoch_indep : ∀ k₁ k₂, k₁ ≠ k₂ →
    ∀ j₁ j₂, IndepFun (epochStream k₁ j₁) (epochStream k₂ j₂) toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P
  -- Identical distribution within and across epochs
  h_epoch_ident : ∀ k j, IdentDistrib (epochStream k j) (toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.ξ 0)
    toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P

namespace SVRGOuterSetup

/-- Epoch-indexed iterate: `outerProcess k ω` is the snapshot at epoch k.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, epoch iterate definition) -/
noncomputable def outerProcess (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω) : ℕ → Ω → E
  | 0, ω => setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀
  | k + 1, ω =>
      let w_k := outerProcess setup k ω
      let gradF_wk := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF w_k
      setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess w_k gradF_wk setup.m ω

omit [SecondCountableTopology E] in
@[simp] theorem outerProcess_zero (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω) :
    outerProcess setup 0 = fun _ => setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ := rfl

omit [SecondCountableTopology E] in
@[simp] theorem outerProcess_succ (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω) (k : ℕ) :
    outerProcess setup (k + 1) = fun ω =>
      setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess setup k ω)
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess setup k ω))
        setup.m ω := rfl

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 2: Measurability and Independence Infrastructure
-- ============================================================================

/-- Measurability of epoch iterates.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, Step 4 — measurability bridge) -/
theorem outerProcess_measurable
    (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (hgF : Measurable setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF) (k : ℕ) :
    Measurable (outerProcess setup k) := by
  induction k with
  | zero => exact measurable_const
  | succ k ih =>
      have h_wk_meas : Measurable (outerProcess setup k) := ih
      have h_gradF_wk_meas : Measurable (fun ω => setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess setup k ω)) :=
        hgF.comp h_wk_meas
      -- Apply staging lemma: svrgProcess with random snapshot (w_k, gradF w_k)
      simpa [SVRGOuterSetup.outerProcess, SVRGSetup.svrgProcess] using
        svrgProcess_measurable_random_snapshot setup.toSVRGSetup
          (outerProcess setup k) (fun ω => setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess setup k ω))
          h_wk_meas h_gradF_wk_meas hgL setup.m

/-- Independence of epoch k iterate from epoch k samples.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, Step 4 — independence bridge) -/
theorem outerProcess_indepFun_epoch
    (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (hgF : Measurable setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF) (k : ℕ) :
    ∀ j, IndepFun (outerProcess setup k) (setup.epochStream k j) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := by
  intro j
  sorry

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 3: Epoch Contraction Factor
-- ============================================================================

/-- Epoch contraction factor: ρ = (1-ημ)^m + η·(variance terms)/μ.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, contraction factor definition) -/
noncomputable def epochContractionFactor (η μ : ℝ) (L : NNReal) (m : ℕ) : ℝ :=
  (1 - η * μ) ^ m + η * (4 * (L : ℝ) ^ 2 / μ + 2 * (L : ℝ) ^ 2) / μ

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 4: Main Outer-Loop Convergence Theorem
-- ============================================================================

/-- SVRG outer-loop convergence: epoch-to-epoch contraction telescoped over K epochs.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, Step 6 — main convergence theorem) -/
theorem svrg_outer_convergence
    (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω) (f : E → ℝ) {L : NNReal} {μ σ η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    (hgrad : IsGradientOf f setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
    (hsmooth : IsLSmooth setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF L)
    (hsc : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ f)
    (hvar : HasBoundedVariance setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist σ)
    (hunb : IsUnbiased setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist)
    (hmin : IsMinimizer f wStar)
    (h_sample_prob : IsProbabilityMeasure setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist)
    (hμ_pos : 0 < μ) (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hη_L : η ≤ 1 / (2 * (L : ℝ)))
    (hημ : η * μ < 1)
    (K : ℕ) (hK_pos : 0 < K)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (hgF : Measurable setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
    (h_intL : ∀ w, Integrable (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL w) setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist)
    (h_int_epoch_end : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω => ‖outerProcess setup k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2)
      setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_snapshot : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω =>
      ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess setup k ω)
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess setup k ω))
        setup.m ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P) :
    ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess setup K ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
      (epochContractionFactor η μ L setup.m) ^ K * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 := by
  haveI := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.hP
  set ρ := epochContractionFactor η μ L setup.m with hρ_def
  
  have h_epoch_contract : ∀ k < K,
      ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess setup (k + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
        ρ * ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess setup k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := by
    intro k hk
    sorry
  
  have h_telescope :
      ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess setup K ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
        ρ ^ K * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 := by
    induction K with
    | zero =>
        simp only [outerProcess_zero setup, pow_zero, one_mul]
        rw [integral_const, smul_eq_mul, probReal_univ, one_mul]
    | succ K ih =>
        have h_contract := h_epoch_contract K (Nat.lt_succ_self K)
        have hρ_nonneg : 0 ≤ ρ := by
          rw [hρ_def, epochContractionFactor]
          -- (1 - η*μ)^m ≥ 0 since 0 ≤ 1 - η*μ (from hημ : η*μ < 1)
          have h1 : 0 ≤ (1 - η * μ) ^ m := pow_nonneg (sub_nonneg.mpr hημ.le) _
          -- η*(4*L^2/μ + 2*L^2)/μ ≥ 0 since η > 0, L^2 ≥ 0, μ > 0
          have h2 : 0 ≤ η * (4 * (L : ℝ) ^ 2 / μ + 2 * (L : ℝ) ^ 2) / μ := by
            apply div_nonneg
            · apply mul_nonneg hη_pos.le
              apply add_nonneg
              · apply div_nonneg
                · nlinarith [sq_nonneg (L : ℝ)]
                · exact hμ_pos.le
              · nlinarith [sq_nonneg (L : ℝ)]
            · exact hμ_pos.le
          linarith
        calc ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess setup (K + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P
            ≤ ρ * ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess setup K ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := h_contract
          _ ≤ ρ * (ρ ^ K * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2) := by
              exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left ih hρ_nonneg
          _ = ρ ^ (K + 1) * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 := by
              rw [pow_succ]
  
  exact h_telescope

end SVRGOuterSetup
